reason: Both answers reach the same correct verdict and cover the core substance: ledger tables for auditability, plain CRUD for subscriptions, idempotent usage ingestion, and considering a billing vendor before building. B more explicitly names the "excitement is the tell" point (teams choose ES to be interesting, not because billing requires it), which is a key insight the question invites. B also gives crisper criteria for when full ES would be justified. Both are similar in length and quality otherwise, but B covers the full set of key points slightly more precisely.
